segments.text: This is an underground high-tech greenhouse with enough grass to pack a whole stadium. Down here, temperature and light and water are all being
autonomously controlled, and scientists had to test the best artificial conditions for the grass, using simulated models to predict how it's going to grow down there and adding
sensors to monitor its condition. The grass stays down here for up to 300 days a year until
they bring it to the surface for a soccer match. This is the retractable pitch in Real Madrid's new stadium. It's the first one to ever do this, and this
greenhouse ensures that the grass stays in perfect condition for games. But if sports aren't your thing, this tech is a big deal elsewhere. If you want to see more about that and this crazy stadium,
